source_window_freshness_confidence.source: GA4 BigQuery daily export + VM Cloud funnel-health aggregate
source_window_freshness_confidence.window: latest available GA4 daily table last_7d per site
source_window_freshness_confidence.caveat: This is aggregate cross-check. Row-level buyer/dropout dwell join needs safe session/order bridge.

join_readiness.why_not_direct_unique_order_rate: GA4 sessions, VM Cloud confirmed purchase rows, and Meta CAPI send attempts are different counting units. Source-specific rates need a shared safe session/order key.
required_next_fields: VM Cloud client_id or user_pseudo_id presence aggregate
confirmed purchase safe_ref to session bridge
safe_now: VM Cloud confirmed purchase aggregate by site
